text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
One day, I decide to check out a sale<n>that caught
my attention.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
DAMMIT! I wasn't expectin' the<n>competition to
be this fierce...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Money's tight, and I can't afford to<n>lose out on
these deals. B-but this...
choice_data_list: Looks like a war zone here.
Looks like a war zone here.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Hm? Oh, it's just you. Didn't expect<n>to see ya—

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Grrr, I'm not backin' down! This<n>Umamusume
isn't goin' home till<n>she's got the goods!
choice_data_list: Get a grasp on the crowd's movements!
Get a grasp on the crowd's movements!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Grrr, I'm not backin' down! This<n>Umamusume
isn't goin' home till<n>she's got the goods!
choice_data_list: Get a grasp on the crowd's movements!
Get a grasp on the crowd's movements!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Y-you're right! I gotta watch 'em just<n>like in my
races...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Now's my chance! I'mma flank 'em<n>from the
inside and attack 'em real<n>good!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Take dat! Outta my way! I'll show ya<n>what an
Osaka shopper's really like!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Huff... huff... I thought I wasgonna get crushed in there!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: But how's that for speed?! I leftabout fifteen other shoppers in thedust!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Ya better believe it! C'mon, lemme<n>me hear ya
say it again! Three cheers<n>for White Lightning!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
I guess that's one way to approach<n>it. Time to
take a step back from the<n>front line!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
The enemy knows my movements,<n>so they'll
just send me flyin' if I try<n>to dive in from the
front.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
I gotta be extra cautious with that<n>older lady in
the tiger stripes. That's<n>Iron Wall Michiyo, and
she's trouble.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
She shuts out all her rivals' paths so<n>no one can
get through... All the<n>regulars know her.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
If I wanna avoid Michiyo and get to<n>what I want...
Then I've gotta go this<n>way!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
A'ight, I'm gonna dive in! Watch and<n>learn,
rookie!
